current.headline: De Bruyne leads Belgium into Senegal knockout test
current.summary: Belgium's knockout tie with Senegal has centered on whether Kevin De Bruyne can control the game and create the decisive goal involvement against a fast Senegal side.

items.headline: Belgium vs Senegal: De Bruyne versus a side that does not stop scoring
items.summary: Belgium enter with De Bruyne pulling the strings after a 5-1 group-stage win, while Senegal arrive with transition pace and a 5-0 victory over Iraq behind them.

items.headline: Belgium World Cup 2026 team guide highlights De Bruyne and Doku quality
items.summary: Belgium's remaining golden-generation quality is built around De Bruyne's control and Doku's threat, making chance creation the core storyline before Senegal.

items.headline: Senegal thrash 10-man Iraq to boost hopes of reaching last 32
items.summary: Iliman Ndiaye and Ismaila Sarr produced a goal and an assist each as Senegal's attack found rhythm before meeting Belgium.
